response: Data collection begins with gathering data from various sources to ensure accuracy. Data is analyzed to identify patterns and relationships within the data set. Data entry requires careful handling to maintain data integrity throughout the process. Data validation ensures that all data remains consistent and reliable. Data interpretation involves examining data to uncover significant findings. Data storage must be secure to protect the data from unauthorized access. Data sharing allows researchers to compare data across different studies. Data visualization helps in presenting data in a clear and understandable format.
